title: 1.1: Includes a raw image load test exercising 24-bit format (f=24)
1.2: Includes a raw image load test exercising 32-bit format (f=32)
1.3: Includes a chunked raw image load test that asserts stored bytes equal the concatenated chunks
1.4: Includes a file-path based image load test with deterministic byte expectations
1.5: Includes a temp-file based image load test that asserts the temp file is deleted by the implementation
1.6: Includes a shared-memory based image load test that asserts the shared-memory object is unlinked
1.7: Includes a PNG RGBA-mode load test that asserts decoded RGBA bytes match expected
1.8: Includes a PNG RGB-mode load test that asserts decoded bytes match the expected conversion output
1.9: Includes a grayscale-ish PNG load test that asserts decoded bytes match expected RGBA conversion
1.10: Includes a tiny PNG sanity test that asserts decoded pixel bytes match an expected RGBA byte sequence
1.11: Includes an invalid PNG test that asserts the error code is EBADPNG
1.12: Includes an image load test using client numbers (I=) that asserts lookup-by-number returns an image
1.13: Includes a chunked image load test using client numbers (I=) with deterministic byte expectations
1.14: Includes a put operation test that references an image by client number (I=) that asserts OK
1.15: Includes a delete operation test that deletes an image by client number (I=) that asserts a state change
1.16: Includes an animation test that adds at least one non-root frame that asserts extra frame state is present
1.17: Includes an animation test that overwrites an existing frame that asserts the stored frame bytes equal the new bytes
1.18: Includes an animation composition test that copies pixels from one frame into another that asserts the composed output
1.19: Includes an animation deletion test that deletes a frame that asserts extra frame state shrinks
1.20: Includes an animation partial-edit test that asserts the resulting frame bytes match an expected partial update
1.21: Includes an animation test that creates a new frame using an existing frame as the base that asserts the new frame bytes
1.22: Includes an animation gap-timing test that updates the root frame gap that asserts root_frame_gap equals the set value
1.23: Includes an animation gap-timing test that updates a non-root frame gap that asserts the stored gap equals the set value
1.24: Includes an animation control test that changes the current frame that asserts current_frame_index changes deterministically
2.1: All newly added graphics image-loading integration tests are placed in kitty_tests/graphics.py
3.1: Newly added tests are defined as methods within a discoverable unittest test class
3.2: Newly added tests follow the naming convention test_<descriptive_name>
3.3: Newly added tests validate behavior using assertions rather than logging-only or comment-only validation
4.1: New tests reuse existing protocol send/parse helpers instead of introducing bespoke protocol parsing
4.2: Tests that allocate persistent graphics state include deterministic cleanup or teardown assertions
